command: Start-Process 'C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe' -ArgumentList '--user-data-dir="C:\Users\Revexn\AppData\Local\Google\Chrome\User Data"', '--profile-directory="Default"', 'https://business.google.com/create' ; Write-Output 'Chrome opened on Google Business Profile create page'
description: فتح Chrome العادي على صفحة إنشاء Google Business Profile
